underlying_goal: Design and plan an enterprise AI-native SaaS platform by combining multiple open-source frameworks (Paperclip, deer-flow, OpenViking, nanobot, flowgram.ai, etc.) with minimal modification
friction_detail: Initial architecture over-complicated with Paperclip as control plane; user guided Claude to simplify to deer-flow as the main framework through iterative questioning.
brief_summary: User wanted to plan an enterprise AI SaaS platform by combining open-source frameworks; through iterative discussion, they converged on deer-flow + OpenViking + flowgram.ai as the minimal viable architecture.
